data.narrative:
Ares Industries is a Series A-stage Defense & Security company founded by Alex Tseng and Devan Plantamura, currently valued at $150M post-money with $31M raised to date. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of nine same-sector peers at Series A and adjacent stages, comprising two public companies (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and eight private firms including Anduril Industries, Stark Defence, and Vatn Systems.

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis, using a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A to next-stage advancement, implies a value of $300M from the current $150M post-money base. Peer-median analysis across the nine-company comp set yields $1.0B, with the peer range spanning $60M to $1.5B. The peer sample includes five named Series B benchmarks: Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, and Harmattan AI at $1.5B–$1.4B, and Castelion and Defense Unicorns at $1.0B.

Triangulation of these two methods supports a valuation range of $255M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $650M. The wide dispersion reflects material uncertainty around whether Ares tracks closer to stage-normalized progression or to the substantially higher valuations commanded by peer companies, likely driven by differences in revenue maturity, customer traction, and market position within the Defense & Security sector.
